summary: Full validation of the 4 new/fixed features (touch scroll fix, Zigbee screen + API, electrolyseur<->pump coupling, warning-before-critical alerts). Backend: 17/17 pytest pass (100%) including 5 new Zigbee tests and 3 new coupling tests. GET /api/zigbee/devices returns exactly 9 seeded devices (4 relays + 5 sensors) each with an assigned_role. PUT /api/zigbee/devices/{id} works for both assigned_role and friendly_name; unknown id returns 404. POST /api/zigbee/devices/rescan returns {ok:true, devices:[...9]}. Coupling: POST /api/equipment/electrolyseur/toggle {state:true} while pump OFF returns 409 with a French message mentioning 'pompe' and 'électrolyseur'; when pump is ON it returns 200. Stopping the pump while electrolyseur is ON returns 200 AND stops the electrolyseur AND creates an info alert with title 'Électrolyseur arrêté'. Regression: GET /api/dashboard/summary still returns 6 sensors + 4 equipment + 3 schedules + 10 widgets. All other CRUD (settings, schedule, alerts, widgets, sensors/history) still pass. Frontend at 1024x600: nav-zigbee is present in the sidebar and loads the zigbee-screen showing relays grouped, sensors grouped, chips, inline name edit and Rescanner button. Clicking a role chip (zigbee-role-{id}-lighting) triggers a PUT and the 'Assignation mise à jour.' feedback appears. Kiosk CSS: body.touch-action == 'auto' (the previous 'manipulation' value has been removed as required); body.cursor == 'none' and html.cursor == 'none' still enforced (cursor hidden). Scroll works inside the Zigbee screen (scrollTop 9→200). No JS console errors; only a pre-existing pointerEvents deprecation warning remains.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents'. Not tied to this iteration. Search codebase for `pointerEvents=` on View/Pressable and migrate to style.pointerEvents.

action_items: Optional cosmetic: migrate remaining `pointerEvents` prop to `style.pointerEvents` to silence the deprecation warning.

The warning-before-critical alert logic (10% inner band → warning, out-of-range → critical, only on transitions) is implemented in server.py `evaluate_metric_alerts()` and looks correct on code review, but was NOT exercised end-to-end here because the sensor simulator naturally jitters values (would need to force sensor_state or settings to deterministically cross bands). Consider a dedicated integration test that PUTs settings with a very narrow ph_min/ph_max around the current ph value to force warn→critical transitions and inspects /api/alerts.
critical_code_review_comments: Coupling logic in POST /api/equipment/{eid}/toggle (server.py L500-532) is correct: the 409 check happens before any DB write and the automatic electrolyseur cut on filtration=off writes state=0 and creates an info alert in the same connection block.
PUT /api/zigbee/devices/{did} (server.py L765-777) correctly rejects empty payloads with 400 and non-existent ids with 404 via cur.rowcount==0.
evaluate_metric_alerts() uses a module-level _alert_state dict keyed by metric name to fire alerts only on transitions - matches the 'no spam' requirement. Warn band = inner 10% of [min,max].

ZigbeeScreen.tsx uses fetch directly with EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL - consistent with other screens (via api.ts). testIDs are exhaustive (zigbee-screen, zigbee-rescan, zigbee-{id}, zigbee-role-{id}-{role}, zigbee-edit-name-{id}, zigbee-name-input-{id}, zigbee-name-save-{id}).

Kiosk CSS in app/index.tsx no longer contains `touch-action: manipulation` on html/body - verified via getComputedStyle: touchAction='auto'. cursor:none is preserved on html/body/#root/* and TextInput/textarea override is intact.
Minor: `_widgets_list_UNUSED_TMP` dead function still present at server.py L736. Safe to delete.
seed_data_creation: None. All test-created data (schedules, role changes, friendly names) restored to original values in-test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 4 validated the 4 new features. Backend has full CRUD coverage for Zigbee + explicit coupling tests. Frontend: 1024x600 landscape, kiosk CSS verified (touch-action:auto restored, cursor:none preserved). The warning-vs-critical alert path was reviewed in code only (logic looks correct with a per-metric _alert_state transition guard) - if you need functional coverage, force settings around current sensor values to induce transitions. Dead code `_widgets_list_UNUSED_TMP` at server.py L736 can be removed. Only the pointerEvents deprecation warning remains from earlier iterations.
rca_of_issue: N/A - all requested features work as specified.
